summary: The diff implements most of the requirements. REQ-23 and REQ-24 are addressed in backend/main.mo with a consolidated isAdmin/requireAdmin helper reading from the stable userProfiles store. REQ-25 is addressed across all six admin panel pages with auth error banners and toast messages. However, there are concerns about whether the backend fix is fully correct (the diff shows Map.empty which may not be stable/persistent), and the diff is truncated so full verification of REQ-24's consolidation across all admin-gated functions is not possible. The frontend coverage for REQ-25 appears complete across the listed pages.

missing_requirements.requirement: The backend helper function that checks for admin role uses the same stable HashMap/Trie/variable that profiles are written to during registration — not a separate or uninitialized store.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows 'let userProfiles = Map.empty<Principal, UserProfile>()' which appears to initialize a new, non-stable map rather than a stable variable. If this is not actually persisted across upgrades as a stable store, it would not satisfy the requirement that the admin check reads from the same stable store used during registration. The diff is truncated so the full stable variable declarations cannot be confirmed.

missing_requirements.requirement: No admin-gated function contains its own inline role-check logic that could diverge from the central helper. All previously broken admin operations succeed after this consolidation.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff is truncated and only shows the helper definitions (isAdmin, requireAdmin, requireAdminOrStaff). It is not possible to confirm from the truncated diff that every admin-gated function (addFeeItem, addCourse, registerStudent, updateAdmissionStatus, postResult, sendAnnouncement, approveHostelApplication) has been updated to use requireAdmin instead of inline checks.

hallucinated_features.description: An AccessControl mixin system (MixinAuthorization, AccessControl.initState, assignCallerUserRole, requireUser) was introduced as a separate authorization layer on top of the profile-based isAdmin check.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only asked for fixing the role-check logic reading from the stable profiles store and consolidating it into a single helper. It did not request a separate access-control layer, mixin pattern, or assignCallerUserRole flow. This adds new infrastructure beyond fixing the authorization bug.

hallucinated_features.description: AdmissionsManagementPage.tsx was also updated with authorization error handling, even though REQ-25 only listed FeeManagementPage, ProgrammeManagementPage, StudentManagementPage, ResultsManagementPage, MessagingPage, and HostelManagementPage.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-25 explicitly lists six pages; AdmissionsManagementPage is not among them. Adding auth error handling to it goes beyond the stated requirements.
